base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of alucard_full_poseset — a character (boss) from 1997 castlevania symphony of night. Alucard — walk/run/dash/jump/double-jump/slide/parry/shield-rod/spell-cast/summon-familiar (Sword/Demon/Bat/Ghost/Faerie) + weapon-specific attack animations × wolf/bat/mist transformations. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Alucard — walk/run/dash/jump/double-jump/slide/parry/shield-rod/spell-cast/summon-familiar (Sword/Demon/Bat/Ghost/Faerie) + weapon-specific attack animations × wolf/bat/mist transformations
